user.title: Websocket Event Filter
user.description: Filter entity IDs from the websocket event stream to improve frontend performance. Enter one item per line in each field.

data_description.deny_prefixes: Block entities whose IDs start with these prefixes, e.g. sensor.gem_
data_description.deny_patterns: Block entities matching these regular expressions, e.g. ^sensor\.gem_.*$
data_description.allow_prefixes: Allow-list mode: only forward entities starting with these prefixes. When set, deny rules are ignored.
data_description.allow_patterns: Allow-list mode: only forward entities matching these patterns. When set, deny rules are ignored.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one instance of Websocket Event Filter can be configured.

init.title: Websocket Event Filter
init.description: Update filter rules. The integration will reload automatically to apply changes. Enter one item per line.

data_description.deny_prefixes: Block entities whose IDs start with these prefixes, e.g. sensor.gem_
data_description.deny_patterns: Block entities matching these regular expressions, e.g. ^sensor\.gem_.*$
data_description.allow_prefixes: Allow-list mode: only forward entities starting with these prefixes. When set, deny rules are ignored.
data_description.allow_patterns: Allow-list mode: only forward entities matching these patterns. When set, deny rules are ignored.

error.invalid_regex: One or more patterns are not valid regular expressions.
